channel.title: INartsAndEnt
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INartsAndEnt, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: $636.3M Worldwide Hit Fantasy Movie Just Arrived On Netflix & It's A Must-Watch

item.description: TMZ Sports is going live from the newsroom to discuss the day's biggest stories ... but we don't just want folks to watch and enjoy the conversation, ...

item.title: 49ers' Keion White Reportedly In Argument With Lil Baby, Crew Before Shooting
